channel.title: GitHub Smalltalk Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Smalltalk in GitHub

item.title: SeasideSt/Seaside
item.description: The framework for developing sophisticated web applications in Smalltalk.

item.title: svenvc/zinc
item.description: Zinc HTTP Components is an open-source Smalltalk framework to deal with the HTTP networking protocol.

item.title: pharo-contributions/OSSubprocess
item.description: Forking Operating System Processes from within Pharo Language
